spec.name: A Stairway
spec.description: You stand now at the head of a stairway that goes down into darkness. The steps and walls are smooth sandy stone, covered with a thick layer of dust. Some inscriptions are carved into the wall here.

east.description: You see the backside of the coffin lid, featureless stone.

down.description: It is too dark to see down the stairway.

extra_descs.description: You blow dust away from the inscriptions to read: Beware the curse of the mummy.
On this side the coffin lid is smooth featureless stone.
